walking_direction_steps: Start at RK Beach main promenade near NTR statue. Walk north along RK Beach Road for about 300 metres. Pass the children's park on your right. Red Bowl - Pan Asian Kitchen is inside Novotel Hotel on your left just before Varun Beach.
nearby_places_on_route: NTR Statue, Kali Temple, INS Kursura Submarine Museum, Children's Park
description: A short pleasant beachside stroll from RK Beach to Novotel. Walk along the scenic sea promenade with sea breeze and views of the Bay of Bengal the entire way.

walking_direction_steps: Start from RK Beach promenade near NTR statue. Walk north along RK Beach Road. Continue past Kali Temple on your left. Sea Pearl restaurant is beside the children's park near Varun Beach, just across from Novotel.
nearby_places_on_route: NTR Statue, Kali Temple, Aircraft Museum, Children's Park, INS Kursura
description: A peaceful sea-facing walk along RK Beach Road. The route runs parallel to the Bay of Bengal offering sunset views and cool ocean breeze.

walking_direction_steps: Start from RK Beach promenade near INS Kursura Submarine Museum. Walk south along RK Beach Road. Continue past the submarine entrance on your left. Walk another 200 metres and you will see the TU-142 Aircraft Museum. Chai Sutta Bar is right beside the Aircraft Museum entrance.
nearby_places_on_route: INS Kursura Submarine, VUDA Park, Aircraft Museum TU-142, Beach Volleyball Courts
description: One of the most scenic walking spots in Vizag. Walk along the beach-facing path past war memorials and iconic aircraft and submarine museums to reach this popular chai café.

walking_direction_steps: Start at RK Beach main entrance near the parking area. Walk towards NTR statue. KFC is right beside NTR statue on RK Beach Road. You can spot the KFC signboard from the beach.
nearby_places_on_route: NTR Statue, VUDA Park, RK Beach Promenade, Kali Temple
description: A very short walk from the beach. This stretch near NTR statue is one of the busiest and best-lit parts of RK Beach Road making it very safe and lively.

restaurant_name: Mr and Mrs Idly South Indian Restaurant
destination_landmark: Beside Kali Temple RK Beach Road
walking_direction_steps: Start from RK Beach promenade near NTR statue. Walk north along RK Beach Road. Pass VUDA Park on your left. Continue walking until you reach Kali Temple junction on your right. Mr and Mrs Idly restaurant is right beside Kali Temple on RK Beach Road.
nearby_places_on_route: NTR Statue, VUDA Park, RK Beach Promenade, Kali Temple, Novotel
description: A gentle morning walk along Vizag's iconic beachside road. The route passes VUDA Park and Kali Temple. Ideal for a post-morning walk idly breakfast with sea views.

destination_landmark: Harbour Park Road near Ramakrishna Mission
walking_direction_steps: Start from RK Beach promenade near INS Kursura. Walk south along RK Beach Road. At the end of the beach stretch turn left into Harbour Park Road. Walk straight for about 200 metres. Patnam House is opposite Ramakrishna Mission Ashram on Harbour Park Road.
nearby_places_on_route: INS Kursura Submarine, Ramakrishna Mission Ashram, Harbour Park, Beach Promenade
description: A pleasant heritage walk past the submarine museum and along Harbour Park Road. Ramakrishna Mission Ashram adds a calm spiritual atmosphere to this route.

walking_direction_steps: Start at RK Beach promenade. Walk south along RK Beach Road past the Beach Volleyball courts. Continue for about 500 metres past VUDA Park entrance. Spark Foods is at 7-6-2 RK Beach Road on your right side just after the park stretch.
nearby_places_on_route: VUDA Park, Beach Volleyball Courts, RK Beach Promenade, Children's Rides Area
description: Walk along the beach with the sea on one side and parks on the other. This stretch is calm in mornings and lively in evenings with families and tourists.

walking_direction_steps: Start from RK Beach main promenade. Walk south past INS Kursura Submarine Museum. Continue along RK Beach Road for another 300 metres. You will reach the Helicopter Museum UH-3H. Caffeine Cups is at Shop No.2 right inside the Helicopter Museum complex.
nearby_places_on_route: INS Kursura, TU-142 Aircraft Museum, Helicopter Museum, Coastal Battery
description: A lovely heritage walk along RK Beach Road past famous war memorial museums. Caffeine Cups offers coffee with views near the helicopter museum.

destination_landmark: Beside Aqua Sports Complex Beach Road
walking_direction_steps: Start at Beach Road near Gokul Park junction. Walk north along Beach Road. Pass the swimming pool complex on your left. Gluttons Garage is at 7-5-182 Beach Road right beside Aqua Sports Complex on your right.
nearby_places_on_route: Gokul Park, Aqua Swimming Pool Complex, Beach Promenade, Novotel
description: Walk along Vizag's stunning Beach Road with the sea on one side. This continental restaurant sits right beside the sports complex and is a favourite among tourists.

destination_landmark: Opposite Aqua Swimming Pool Beach Road
walking_direction_steps: Start at Beach Road near Novotel Hotel. Walk south along Beach Road. Cross the Gokul Park parking area. KFC is on the ground floor opposite the Aqua Swimming Pool Complex on Beach Road. You can see the KFC sign from the main road.
nearby_places_on_route: Aqua Swimming Pool, Gokul Park, Novotel, Children's Park, RK Beach
description: One of the shortest walks on Beach Road. The entire route hugs the coastline giving you ocean views all the way. Perfect after evening beach walks.

walking_direction_steps: Start from Beach Road near Novotel. Walk south along Beach Road. Continue past the pop-up cafe area near Novotel parking. Walk another 300 metres along the beach facing road. Zoom Restaurant is at 15-18-17 Beach Road opposite Gokul Park on your right.
nearby_places_on_route: Novotel Hotel, Gokul Park, Aqua Pool Complex, Pop-up Cafes Strip
description: This Beach Road walk offers unobstructed sea views throughout. Gokul Park is a pleasant landmark and the pop-up café strip nearby adds to the vibrant beach atmosphere.

walking_direction_steps: Start near Gokul Park on Beach Road. Walk towards Novotel direction staying on Beach Road. WelcomCafe Oceanic is inside WelcomHotel Grand Bay which is directly on Beach Road. Look for the hotel entrance signboard on your left facing the sea.
nearby_places_on_route: Gokul Park, Novotel, Aqua Pool, RK Beach Promenade
description: A very short beachside stroll. This upscale sea-facing restaurant inside WelcomHotel makes for an elegant dining destination reachable with a brief walk along the ocean promenade.

walking_direction_steps: Start from Beach Road near Novotel Hotel. Walk south along Beach Road. You will pass the main Novotel entrance. Just after the entrance look for the Gokul Park parking area on your left. Pop Up Cafe is right at the Gokul Park parking entry on Beach Road opposite Novotel.
nearby_places_on_route: Novotel Hotel, Gokul Park, Sea Promenade, Children's Park
description: A charming short walk between two iconic Beach Road landmarks. The pop-up cafe area is popular with morning joggers and evening beach walkers.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Beach Road near Novotel. Walk south along Beach Road. Pass Gokul Park on your right. Continue for 300 metres. Kailash Pav Bhaji is on Beach Road near the swimming pool complex. Look for the small eatery stall near the pool entrance.
nearby_places_on_route: Gokul Park, Aqua Pool, RK Beach, Novotel, Sea Promenade
description: A classic evening walk along Vizag Beach Road. The swimming pool complex is a key landmark and this street-food spot is popular with evening walkers and families.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Siripuram Junction on VIP Road. Walk along the circular road around Siripuram Circle. The Spicy Venue Restaurant is directly at Siripuram Circle, visible from the main junction. It takes just a short 2-3 minute walk around the circle.
nearby_places_on_route: Siripuram Circle, VIP Road, PL Grand Hotel, Varun Chambers
description: A very short walk at Siripuram junction. This busy commercial circle is well-lit and safe with good footpaths. The restaurant is right on the main road.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Siripuram Junction. Walk along Siripuram Circle Road turning slightly left from VIP Road direction. Bengal by the Bay is at 10-2-8 Siripuram Circle, a few steps from the main junction. Look for the restaurant on the inner road around the circle.
nearby_places_on_route: Siripuram Circle, VIP Road, PL Grand Hotel, Varun Chambers
description: A 3-minute stroll around Siripuram Circle. This well-known Bengal-cuisine spot is easy to find right at the junction landmark.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Siripuram Junction. Walk towards Hotel PL Grand on Siripuram Circle Road. The hotel is directly visible from the junction on the inner circle road. Waltair Kitchen is inside Hotel PL Grand opposite Bubbles Salon.
nearby_places_on_route: Siripuram Circle, VIP Road, Varun Chambers, CMR Central direction
description: A quick stroll to PL Grand Hotel from Siripuram Junction. The area is busy and well-connected making it a convenient stop for tourists exploring the Siripuram area.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Siripuram Junction. Walk around the Siripuram Circle inner road. Pastry Coffee n Conversation is at Shop 21 Siripuram Circle on the inner service road around the junction. The café signboard is visible from the circle road.
nearby_places_on_route: Siripuram Circle, VIP Road, Hotel PL Grand, Varun Chambers
description: A short circle walk to a popular café. Siripuram Circle is a lively junction with several eateries and this café is a favourite for coffee and dessert lovers.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Siripuram Circle. Walk along VIP Road in the direction of Dwaraka Nagar. Fresh Choice is on VIP Road a short distance from Siripuram Junction on your right. Look for the restaurant signboard near the junction stretch of VIP Road.
nearby_places_on_route: Siripuram Circle, VIP Road, Diamond Park direction, Dwaraka Nagar
description: A pleasant walk along VIP Road from Siripuram Junction. VIP Road is Vizag's main arterial road with wide footpaths making it comfortable for walking.

destination_landmark: MVP Double Road near Mango Hyundai Showroom
walking_direction_steps: Start at MVP Colony Circle. Walk along MVP Double Road. Continue past State Bank of India on your left. Walk about 400 metres until you see the Mango Hyundai showroom. Latte Global Cafe is right next to the showroom on MVP Double Road.
ending_landmark: Mango Hyundai Showroom MVP Double Road
nearby_places_on_route: MVP Circle, MVP Double Road, State Bank of India, Lumbini Park
description: MVP Double Road is a well-developed wide road with good footpaths. This is a popular café on Vizag's upscale MVP stretch and easy to find from the colony circle.

destination_landmark: MVP Double Road beside State Bank of India
walking_direction_steps: Start at MVP Colony Circle. Walk south along MVP Double Road. House of Spice is at D.No 1-83-38 MVP Double Road beside State Bank of India on your right side. The SBI branch is a clear landmark visible from the main road.
ending_landmark: State Bank of India MVP Double Road
nearby_places_on_route: MVP Colony Circle, SBI Bank, MVP Double Road, Lumbini Park
description: A short clean walk on MVP Double Road. The SBI bank is a prominent landmark on this stretch making navigation easy. The road is wide and well-lit.

walking_direction_steps: Start at MVP Colony main gate area. Walk along MVP Double Road. Continue past SBI bank and several shops. KFC is on the ground floor of the survey plot building at MVP Double Road. Look for the KFC red sign on your left.
nearby_places_on_route: MVP Circle, SBI Bank, Lumbini Park, Reliance Smart Point
description: MVP Double Road is one of the widest and busiest roads in Vizag making it a very safe walking route. KFC is a prominent landmark here.

walking_direction_steps: Start from MVP Colony Circle. Walk along MVP Main Road. Sri Siva Priya Mess is on MVP Main Road a short walk from the circle. Ask locals for the mess near the main road stretch. The area has several small eateries and the mess is well-known to locals.
nearby_places_on_route: MVP Circle, Reliance Smart Point, Lucky Tiffins stretch, MVP Double Road
description: A neighbourhood walk through MVP Colony's residential stretch. Best for early morning or lunch visits for authentic local Andhra meals at affordable prices.

walking_direction_steps: Start at MVP Colony Circle. Vaisakhi Kshatriya Foods is at MVP Circle directly opposite Lumbini Park. From the circle walk around to the Lumbini Park side. The restaurant is facing the park entrance making it very easy to spot.
nearby_places_on_route: MVP Circle, Lumbini Park, MVP Double Road, Seethammadhara direction
description: A very short walk right at MVP Circle. Lumbini Park is a beautiful green space across the road making this a scenic spot to dine near greenery.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand. Walk into Dwaraka Nagar 1st Lane. Akshayas Food Hub is in Shreemukha Complex on 1st Lane. Walk 300 metres from the bus stand entrance into the lane and the complex will be on your right side.
nearby_places_on_route: Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand, Diamond Park, Dwaraka Inn Hotel, Station Road
description: Walk through the quiet residential lanes of Dwaraka Nagar. The area is safe and well-known for its local family-run eateries.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand. Walk towards Station Road. Hotel Dwaraka Inn is on Station Road beside Reliance Smart Bazaar. The Chai Grill is inside the hotel. Station Road is clearly visible from the bus stand area.
nearby_places_on_route: Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand, Reliance Smart Bazaar, Diamond Park, Subbayya Gari Hotel
description: A short comfortable walk along Station Road from Dwaraka Nagar's busy transport hub. Reliance Smart Bazaar is a useful landmark on this route.

destination_landmark: Dwaraka Nagar 5th Lane near Diamond Park
walking_direction_steps: Start at Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand. Walk south along Dwaraka Nagar towards Diamond Park. Enter Dwaraka Nagar 5th Lane. Subbayya Gari Hotel is in Savitri Summit building on 5th Lane near Diamond Park. Diamond Park is a helpful landmark to navigate from.
nearby_places_on_route: Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand, Diamond Park, Oven Story restaurant, Station Road
description: Walk through Dwaraka Nagar's well-laid residential grid. This legendary Andhra restaurant is worth the short walk from the main bus stand.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand. Enter Dwaraka Nagar 1st Lane. Kamat Restaurant is on 1st Lane a short walk from the main bus stand. Walk 300 metres into the lane and you will find this popular vegetarian restaurant on your left.
nearby_places_on_route: Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand, Akshayas Food Hub, Baybee Chikizza, Diamond Park
description: A comfortable walk along Dwaraka Nagar's well-known 1st Lane which is popular for its concentration of eateries. Ideal for vegetarian food lovers.

destination_landmark: Dwaraka Bus Station beside Lalitha Jewellery
walking_direction_steps: Start at Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand. Walk to Shop No.10 inside the bus stand complex beside Lalitha Jewellery showroom. Ayyappa Biryani House is right inside the bus station premises making it one of the easiest restaurants to reach on foot in the area.
nearby_places_on_route: Dwaraka Nagar Bus Stand, Lalitha Jewellery, Station Road, Reliance Smart Bazaar
description: The easiest walk in Dwaraka Nagar - the restaurant is right inside the bus station area. Ideal for quick biryani before or after bus journeys.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Lawsons Bay Colony main entrance near Beach Road. Walk along Lawsons Bay Main Road into the colony. Continue for about 400 metres past the post office area. Waltair Grills is on Lawsons Bay Main Road. Ask locals near the post office for guidance.
nearby_places_on_route: Beach Road, Lawsons Bay Colony, BCPL Petrol Bunk, SBI Bank

destination_landmark: Near Post Office opposite SBI Bank Lawsons Bay Colony
walking_direction_steps: Start at Lawsons Bay Colony entrance from Beach Road. Walk inside the colony along the main internal road. Pass the BCPL petrol bunk on your right. Mallu Vish is near the post office opposite SBI Bank inside Lawsons Bay Colony. The post office is a clear local landmark.
ending_landmark: Post Office SBI Bank Lawsons Bay
nearby_places_on_route: BCPL Petrol Bunk, SBI Bank, Post Office, Beach Road
description: A quiet neighbourhood walk through Lawsons Bay Colony. The post office and SBI bank are useful navigation landmarks in this area.

destination_landmark: Beach Road Lawsons Bay Colony beside BCPL Petrol Bunk
walking_direction_steps: Start at Lawsons Bay Colony entrance from Beach Road. Uncle's Pulao is on Beach Road right beside the BCPL petrol bunk at Lawsons Bay Colony entrance. It is very easy to find as it is on the main Beach Road facing the sea.
starting_landmark: Lawsons Bay Colony Beach Road Entrance
nearby_places_on_route: Beach Road, BCPL Petrol Bunk, Vizag Drive Stretch, Novotel direction
description: A very short beachside walk along Beach Road. The BCPL petrol bunk is visible from Beach Road making this restaurant very easy to spot for walkers.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Lawsons Bay Colony entrance from RK Beach Road direction. Walk into the colony along the beach road side. Gismat Arabic Restaurant is on the first floor of a building inside Lawsons Bay Colony facing Beach Road. Look for the Arabic restaurant signboard on the first floor.

nearby_places_on_route: RK Beach Road, Beach Road, BCPL Petrol Bunk, Lawsons Bay Post Office
description: Walk through a calm residential colony right beside Beach Road. Gismat serves Arabic cuisine and is a unique dining option on the beachside stretch of Vizag.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Jagadamba Junction. Walk into Chitralaya Road from the main junction. Star Lucky Restaurant is in Jagadamba Commercial Complex on Chitralaya Road. The complex is visible from the main junction area just 200 metres inside Chitralaya Road.
nearby_places_on_route: Jagadamba Junction, Chitralaya Cinema, SR Shopping Mall, Commercial Complex

walking_direction_steps: Start at Jagadamba Junction. Walk to Block No.47 Jagadamba Commercial Complex near Alluri Sitarama. Shawarma Stop is at Kiosk No.03 inside the complex on Raju Road. The commercial complex entrance is clearly visible from the main junction.
nearby_places_on_route: Jagadamba Junction, Alluri Sitarama statue area, SR Shopping Mall, Chitralaya Road
description: A very short walk through Jagadamba's busy commercial area. The complex has multiple food kiosks and is very popular with shoppers and college students.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Jagadamba Junction. Enter Jagadamba Commercial Complex from the main junction entrance. Naidu's Kitchen is at D.No 28-10-8 inside the commercial complex. Walk straight into the complex ground floor and ask any shopkeeper for the restaurant.
nearby_places_on_route: Jagadamba Junction, SR Shopping Mall, Chitralaya Cinema, Commercial Complex
description: A 3-minute walk from Jagadamba Junction into the heart of the commercial complex. Ideal for lunch during shopping trips in the busy Jagadamba market area.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Jagadamba Junction. Walk to Block No.47 Jagadamba Commercial Complex near Alluri Sitarama statue on Raju Road. Wow Momo is at Kiosk No.02 inside the complex just beside the Shawarma Stop kiosk. Look for the Wow Momo green and yellow signboard.
nearby_places_on_route: Jagadamba Junction, Alluri Sitarama Area, SR Shopping Mall, Shawarma Stop
description: This popular momo chain is right inside Jagadamba's famous commercial complex. A 3-minute walk from the busy junction through a lively market area.

destination_landmark: Back side of Jagadamba Junction near SR Shopping Mall
walking_direction_steps: Start at Jagadamba Junction main road. Walk around to the back side of the junction near SR Shopping Mall. Amma Spicy Foods is on the back road parallel to the main junction road near SR Shopping Mall. Ask locals at the junction for the small food stall.
nearby_places_on_route: Jagadamba Junction, SR Shopping Mall, Commercial Complex, Chitralaya Road
description: Walk through the bustling Jagadamba market area to reach this local favourite. The back streets near SR Shopping Mall are filled with small eateries and street food vendors.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Asilmetta Junction on Waltair Main Road. Walk into the Asilmetta area. Kerala Biryani's is at 9-1-243 Asilmetta beside Aarif Opticians. The opticians shop is a visible landmark. The restaurant is within walking distance of the main road.
nearby_places_on_route: Asilmetta Junction, Waltair Main Road, Meghalaya Hotel, CBM Compound
description: A short walk from the Asilmetta junction area. The opticians shop is an easy-to-find landmark in this commercial neighbourhood of Vizag.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Asilmetta Junction on Waltair Main Road. Walk along Waltair Main Road towards Meghalaya Hotel. Golden Hour Restaurant is inside or beside Meghalaya Hotel at Asilmetta. The Meghalaya Hotel is a prominent building visible from the main road junction.
nearby_places_on_route: Asilmetta Junction, Meghalaya Hotel, Waltair Main Road, Kerala Biryani nearby
description: A short comfortable walk on Waltair Main Road. Meghalaya Hotel is one of the well-known landmarks in this part of Vizag making navigation easy.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Seethammadhara Road main stretch near the bus stop. Walk along Seethammadhara Road towards Satyam Junction. Red Pepper Family Restaurant is at 51-14-27 Seethammadhara Road near Satyam Junction on your right side. The junction is a clear landmark.
nearby_places_on_route: Satyam Junction, VUDA Shopping Complex, Eenadu Office, KSR Complex
description: Walk along one of Vizag's prominent residential commercial roads. Satyam Junction is a well-known local landmark making this an easy navigation route.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Seethammadhara Road near the VUDA Shopping Complex. Walk north along Seethammadhara Road. 72 Biryanis is at No.15 Seethammadhara Road. Count the numbered buildings from the complex. The restaurant is on the main road visible from the footpath.
nearby_places_on_route: VUDA Shopping Complex, Eenadu Office, KSR Complex, Satyam Junction
description: Seethammadhara Road is a wide well-lit road with good footpaths. A pleasant walk past the VUDA complex to reach one of the popular biryani restaurants in this area.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Seethammadhara Junction. Walk along Seethammadhara Road towards VUDA Shopping Complex. Samudram Restaurant is in the VUDA Shopping Complex building on Seethammadhara Road opposite Eenadu Office. The Eenadu building is a well-known landmark.
ending_landmark: VUDA Shopping Complex opposite Eenadu Office
nearby_places_on_route: Eenadu Office, VUDA Complex, KSR Complex, Satyam Junction, Seethammadhara Road
description: A short straightforward walk along Seethammadhara Road. VUDA Complex and Eenadu Office are prominent landmarks that make this route very easy to follow.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Seethammadhara Junction. Walk along Seethammadhara Road. Continue past VUDA Shopping Complex. Spice and Dice is at 50-103-4 Seethammadhara Road beside SBI Bank. The SBI Bank branch is a clearly visible landmark. Restaurant is right beside it.
nearby_places_on_route: VUDA Complex, Eenadu Office, Satyam Junction, SBI Bank Seethammadhara
description: Walk along the full length of Seethammadhara Road passing several key landmarks. SBI Bank is one of the most visible landmarks on this stretch.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Maddilapalem main road junction. Walk along Resapuvanipalem Road. CMR Central Mall is the major landmark on this road. McDonald's is inside CMR Central Mall at 52-1-35 Resapuvanipalem Road. The mall building is very visible from the main junction.
nearby_places_on_route: Maddilapalem Junction, CMR Central Mall, Isukathota Bus Stop, NH 16
description: Walk along Resapuvanipalem Road from Maddilapalem junction to the prominent CMR Central Mall. The mall is a major commercial landmark in this part of Vizag.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Maddilapalem Junction on NH 16. Walk along NH 16 towards Isukathota. Pot Biryani Point is on NH 16 near Isukathota Bus Stop. The bus stop is a visible landmark on the highway. The restaurant is beside the bus stop on the main road.
nearby_places_on_route: Maddilapalem Junction, Isukathota Bus Stop, CMR Central Mall, NH 16
description: A short walk along NH 16 from Maddilapalem Junction. The Isukathota Bus Stop is a busy public transport point making this route well-connected and safe.

destination_landmark: CMR Central Mall 4th Floor Resapuvanipalem Road
walking_direction_steps: Start at Maddilapalem Junction. Walk along Resapuvanipalem Road towards CMR Central Mall. Enter CMR Central Mall and take the lift or stairs to 4th Floor. Street Food @ CMR Central is the food court on the 4th floor of the mall with multiple food stalls.
ending_landmark: CMR Central Mall 4th Floor Food Court
nearby_places_on_route: Maddilapalem Junction, CMR Central Mall, McDonald's CMR, Zam Zam Fast Food
description: Walk to CMR Central Mall from Maddilapalem Junction for a food court experience with multiple cuisine options. The mall is air-conditioned and safe for families and tourists.

destination_landmark: Swarna Bharathi Indoor Stadium Junction Resapuvanipalem Road
walking_direction_steps: Start at Maddilapalem Junction. Walk along Resapuvanipalem Road towards the indoor stadium. You will reach Swarna Bharathi Indoor Stadium Junction. Uncle Peter's Pancakes is at 9-1-78 Resapuvanipalem Road opposite the HP Petrol Bunk near the stadium junction beside Falak Restaurant.
nearby_places_on_route: Indoor Stadium Junction, HP Petrol Bunk, CMR Central Mall, Falak Restaurant
description: Walk along Resapuvanipalem Road to the indoor stadium junction. The HP Petrol Bunk is a clear navigation landmark on this well-connected road.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Kailasagiri Cable Car Station or main entrance. Walk down Kailasagiri Hill Road towards the sea. Continue south along the hillside road towards RK Beach Road. At the base turn right onto RK Beach Road. Walk along the beach road heading south past Varun Beach. Novotel Hotel is on RK Beach Road. Red Bowl - Pan Asian Kitchen is inside Novotel.
road_name: Kailasagiri Road to RK Beach Road
nearby_places_on_route: Kailasagiri Park, Titanic Viewpoint, RK Beach, Varun Beach, Novotel, Children's Park
description: A scenic downhill walk from Vizag's iconic hilltop park to the beachside hotel strip. Offers stunning views of the Bay of Bengal during the descent. One of Vizag's best walking experiences.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Kailasagiri Cable Car Station. Walk or take ropeway to base. From the base walk along Kailasagiri Road heading towards RK Beach. Continue south on RK Beach Road. Sea Park Food Court is near RK Beach junction. The beach area with food stalls is clearly visible.
nearby_places_on_route: Kailasagiri Hilltop, Titanic Point, RK Beach, VUDA Park, NTR Statue
description: Walk down from one of Vizag's most popular tourist attractions to the beach food court. The descent offers panoramic sea views and makes this one of the most memorable walking routes in the city.

destination_landmark: Opposite Traffic Police Checkpost Hanumanthawaka Junction
walking_direction_steps: Start at Hanumanthawaka Junction main road. Walk to the traffic police checkpost which is at the main junction. Sri Visweswara Family Restaurant is directly opposite the police checkpost at Hanumanthawaka Junction Road. Very easy to spot from the junction.
nearby_places_on_route: Hanumanthawaka Junction, Traffic Police Checkpost, BRTS Road, Simhachalam direction
description: A very short walk right at the Hanumanthawaka Junction landmark. The traffic police checkpost is one of the most visible local landmarks in this area.

destination_landmark: BRTS Road Simhachalam to Hanumanthawaka Junction
walking_direction_steps: Start at Hanumanthawaka Junction. Walk along BRTS Road heading towards Simhachalam direction. Second Wife Spice Hub is on BRTS Road between Simhachalam and Hanumanthawaka Junction. Walk about 500 metres along the broad BRTS corridor and look for the restaurant on the service road.
nearby_places_on_route: Hanumanthawaka Junction, BRTS Corridor, Simhachalam Temple direction, Traffic Police Checkpost
description: Walk along the wide BRTS Road which has dedicated footpaths. This well-developed road corridor connects Hanumanthawaka to Simhachalam and is safe and well-lit.

walking_direction_steps: Start at PM Palem main junction. Walk towards NH 16 heading south. Continue along the main road connecting PM Palem to NH 16. At NH 16 turn towards Maddilapalem direction. Walk along NH 16 to Isukathota Bus Stop area. Pot Biryani Point is beside the bus stop on NH 16.
nearby_places_on_route: PM Palem Junction, NH 16, Isukathota Bus Stop, Maddilapalem area
description: A moderate walk from PM Palem to the NH 16 stretch. The NH 16 is a broad highway with service lanes and is well-lit in the evening making the walk safe.

walking_direction_steps: Start at PM Palem main junction. Walk along the road towards Maddilapalem. Continue on the main connecting road heading south-east. Cross NH 16 carefully at the pedestrian crossing. Walk along Resapuvanipalem Road. CMR Central Mall is a large prominent building on Resapuvanipalem Road. McDonald's is inside the mall.
road_name: PM Palem Road to Resapuvanipalem Road
nearby_places_on_route: PM Palem Junction, NH 16, Maddilapalem Junction, CMR Central Mall
description: A longer but straightforward walk from PM Palem to the major CMR Central Mall at Maddilapalem. The road is well-connected with public transport if needed.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Madhurawada Junction on NH 16. Walk south along NH 16 service lane. Continue along the highway heading towards Visakhapatnam city direction. Pass through Kommadi Junction if coming from outer Madhurawada. Continue until you reach Isukathota Bus Stop on NH 16. Pot Biryani Point is beside the bus stop.
nearby_places_on_route: Madhurawada Junction, NH 16 Service Lane, Kommadi area, Isukathota Bus Stop
description: A longer walk along NH 16 service lane from Madhurawada. The highway service lane is well-lit at night and used by many commuters making it a safe walking stretch.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Madhurawada Junction. Walk south along NH 16 heading towards the city. Continue on the service lane past Kommadi. Reach Maddilapalem Junction and turn onto Resapuvanipalem Road. Walk along Resapuvanipalem Road to CMR Central Mall. McDonald's is inside CMR Central. Consider using auto-rickshaw for the longer stretch.
nearby_places_on_route: Madhurawada Junction, NH 16, Kommadi Junction, Maddilapalem Junction, CMR Central
description: The longest walk in this collection at about 2.5 km. The entire route follows the well-developed NH 16 corridor. However for distances above 2 km an auto-rickshaw is recommended for convenience.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Rushikonda Beach parking area. Walk south along the coastal road heading towards RK Beach. Continue along the scenic coastal stretch passing Lawsons Bay Colony. Reach RK Beach Road and continue south past Novotel. Sea Pearl is beside the children's park near Varun Beach on RK Beach Road.
ending_landmark: Varun Beach Children's Park RK Beach Road
road_name: Coastal Road to RK Beach Road
nearby_places_on_route: Rushikonda Beach, Coastal Road, Lawsons Bay, RK Beach, Varun Beach, Novotel
description: One of Vizag's most spectacular walking routes. Walk along the coastline from Rushikonda to RK Beach with the Bay of Bengal always in view. Best enjoyed at sunrise or sunset.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Rushikonda Beach. Walk south along the coastal road towards Lawsons Bay Colony. After about 1.2 km you will reach Lawsons Bay Colony entrance. Enter the colony and walk along Lawsons Bay Main Road. Waltair Grills is on Lawsons Bay Main Road inside the colony.
road_name: Coastal Road to Lawsons Bay Main Road
nearby_places_on_route: Rushikonda Beach, Coastal Road, Lawsons Bay Colony, Beach Road stretch
description: A beautiful coastal walk from Rushikonda to Lawsons Bay. This stretch is quieter than RK Beach and offers a more peaceful seaside walking experience.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Gajuwaka Junction. Walk along Gajuwaka Main Road towards RTC Complex direction. Continue through the market stretch and follow the main road towards the restaurant location. Helapuri Restaurant And Buffet will be on the roadside.
nearby_places_on_route: Gajuwaka Junction, Main Market Area
description: Long walking route through busy commercial roads. Auto or Rapido is recommended for convenience due to distance.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Gajuwaka Junction. Walk along the main commercial road passing local shops and market areas. Continue towards the restaurant location following the primary road stretch. Pinkys Kitchen is located near the roadside commercial area.
nearby_places_on_route: Gajuwaka Market, Shopping Area
description: Long walking route through city roads. Rapido Bike or Auto is recommended for faster travel.

walking_direction_steps: Start at Gajuwaka Junction. Walk towards RTC Complex route through Kurmannapalem and NAD Junction road stretch. Continue straight following the main road to reach Biriyani Street restaurant.
nearby_places_on_route: Kurmannapalem, NAD Junction, Jagadamba
description: Very long walking distance. Prefer Rapido Bike, Auto or APSRTC bus for comfortable travel.
